creator: pfgshield-freebsd@yahoo.com
text:
Hello;

I am not the maintainer but ...

1) I cannot reproduce the error: on my 6.3-Release it builds and runs fine,=
 maybe it's something from current.
2) It's a configure error: it would look like someone modified /etc/make.co=
nf while the package was building.

cheers,

   Pedro.
